title: Single-cell analysis reveals a conserved ECM/TGF-beta fibrotic signaling state across human proliferative vitreoretinal diseases
description: Initial minimal public release package containing analysis scripts, selected derived result tables, reproducibility manifests, and source-data accession notes for a study of a conserved fibrotic cell state across proliferative vitreoretinopathy and proliferative diabetic retinopathy. Mixed license: code is released under the MIT License; derived tables, manifests, source-data accession notes, and documentation are released under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0). Archived release DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20816557.
